tree.name: Ryan Kalkbrenner
tree.note: Creighton center, elite rim protector at 7'1". Drafted with pick #34 (NOP own, acquired via SAS).
tree.tradeDescription: Drafted by Hornets with 34th overall pick in 2025 NBA Draft

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 2nd Round Pick (#34) via NOP
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Acquired from Spurs with Devonte' Graham for cash. Pick originally NOP own, traveled NOP → MEM → PHX → SAS → CHA.
